title: Minty Crisp Uruguayan Salmon Bowl
description: A refreshing bowl of smoked salmon and crisp greens with a minty sauce, served on a cedar plank for a smoky finish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and place the pre-soaked cedar plank on a baking sheet.
Spread smoked salmon evenly on the plank, leaving a small border around the edges.
Drizzle olive oil and lime juice over salmon, season with sea salt and pepper.
Bake salmon on cedar plank for 10 minutes until edges curl slightly.
While salmon cooks, chop cucumber, avocado, tomato, radish, onion, cilantro, and mint into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped vegetables and toss with a pinch of salt.
Remove salmon from oven and let it rest for 2 minutes before slicing into strips.
Arrange the vegetable mix in a bowl and top with salmon strips, avocado, and remaining mint.
Garnish with extra mint leaves and a drizzle of olive oil if desired.
Serve immediately, enjoying the smoky cedar flavor with crisp freshness.
